name: spotlight
description: OSINT investigation orchestration for journalists: structured briefs, methodology approval, sourced findings, independent fact-checking, review artifacts, and knowledge ingestion.

interface.shortDescription: Structured OSINT investigation orchestration for journalists.
interface.longDescription: Spotlight turns leads into case files with brief approval, methodology design, bounded research cycles, independent fact-checking, review artifacts, provenance records, and knowledge ingestion. Plugin install provides the agent-facing skills and docs only; full local runtime dependency installation is handled by the pinned setup page.
defaultPrompt: Use the spotlight skill to investigate this lead
Run Spotlight methodology planning for this case
Review this case file with Spotlight
